commit_scope: Go native front-door route decision visibility

commands: cd form/form-kernel-go && gofmt -w server.go server_test.go && go test ./...

cd form/form-kernel-go && go run . serve --port 18183 --upstream https://api.coherencycoin.com --stdlib ../form-stdlib --config /Users/ursmuff/.coherence-network/secrets/form-kernel-postgres-tunnel.json ../../deploy/front-door/api.bml

curl -sS -i -H 'Accept: application/json' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Coherence-Agent: codex-route-visibility' -H 'User-Agent: coherence-route-visibility-probe/1.0' -X POST http://127.0.0.1:18183/api/substrate/form -d '{"expression":"?lattice","mode":"ast"}'
local_validation.summary: The Go front door now stamps route decisions with X-Form-Route-How, X-Form-Route-Where, X-Form-Route-When, and X-Form-Route-Who on both native BML handlers and Python fanout bridge responses.

known_failed_attempts.command: cd form/form-kernel-go && gofmt -w server.go server_test.go && go test ./...
known_failed_attempts.reason: Initial fanout test used a newline-bearing outbound HTTP header value; Go rejected it before upstream dispatch.
known_failed_attempts.resolution: Use a valid actor header in the live fanout test and keep newline/tab sanitization covered in TestRouteDecisionHeadersShowWhereWhenWhoHow.

ci_validation.reason: No commit or PR created in this turn.

deploy_validation.reason: No production deploy performed. Local listener proof used the public production API as upstream for fanout.

phase_gate.reason: Local tests, native curl proof, fanout curl proof, and evidence validation passed, but CI/deploy validation has not run for this uncommitted worktree.

evidence_refs: Go test proof: cd form/form-kernel-go && go test ./... passed after the live fanout header fixture used a valid outbound HTTP header value.

Native route proof: local Go listener returned HTTP/1.1 200 OK with X-Form-Router: native-kernel-go, X-Form-Route-How: native-kernel-go, X-Form-Route-Where: route:api-health pattern:/api/health request:/api/health, X-Form-Route-Who: codex-route-visibility, and a Form-native health body.

Fanout proof: local Go listener returned HTTP/1.1 200 OK with X-Form-Router: fanout-python, X-Form-Route-How: fanout-python, X-Form-Route-Where: upstream:https://api.coherencycoin.com/api/substrate/form, X-Form-Route-Who: codex-route-visibility, and the public lattice result for POST /api/substrate/form.
Architecture memory updated to state that route-decision headers are first-class visibility for native and bridge paths, while fanout still does not count as high-grammar native promotion.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The Go kernel listener shows where, when, who, and how every matched native route or unmatched fanout route was decided at the front door.
test_flows: matched BML route executes natively and stamps native-kernel-go route decision headers
unmatched substrate form POST fans out to the configured production upstream and stamps fanout-python route decision headers
fanout forwards route decision headers to the upstream request and returns them to the caller
